rationale:
First weight at C#: a warm bloom rises behind the palm and a quiet phrase settles. Linen is held back so cycle 8's muhayyar still has room to arrive, and so its proper introduction at cycle 14 lands fresh.

critique_note: Composite scene introduces three new elements (bloom SVG, text, linen image) at once before the muhayyar peak in cycle 8, pre-spending the arrival's weight and crowding the room. Linen also duplicates the anchor introduced fresh in cycle 14.
critique_suggestion: Reduce to bloom + text only; defer linen to its planned introduction at cycle 14 so the muhayyar in cycle 8 still has room to bloom as the first true climactic weight.
